targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigations WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigation_learnings WHERE deprecated = false
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigation_embeddings) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigations WHERE outcome IN ('resolved','escalated','failed')), 0), 1) AS pct

SELECT date_trunc('hour', started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'resolved') AS resolved, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'escalated') AS escalated, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'failed') AS failed FROM investigations WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS learnings, SUM(CASE WHEN learning_type = 'solution' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS solutions FROM investigation_learnings WHERE deprecated = false AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at

panels.description: CPU usage across all monitored hosts
panels.title: CPU Usage by Host

panels.description: Memory usage across all monitored hosts
panels.title: Memory Usage by Host

panels.description: All CFOperator logs with level filter
panels.title: CFOperator Logs (Live)

panels.description: Errors and warnings with component context
panels.title: Errors & Warnings

panels.description: OODA loop, sweeps, investigations, and tool calls
panels.title: Agent & Tools Activity

panels.description: LLM calls, embeddings, and knowledge base operations
panels.title: LLM & Knowledge Base

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sweep_reports sr, jsonb_array_elements(sr.findings) AS f WHERE sr.id = (SELECT id FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND COALESCE(f->>'status', 'open') NOT IN ('resolved', 'false_positive')
SELECT severity FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as sweep_count FROM sweep_reports WHERE swept_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM swept_at) * 1000 as swept_at FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sr.id AS report_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () - 1 AS finding_idx, f->>'severity' AS severity, f->>'finding' AS finding, COALESCE(f->>'status', 'open') AS status, COALESCE(f->>'remediation', '') AS remediation, COALESCE(f->>'resolution', '') AS resolution FROM sweep_reports sr, jsonb_array_elements(sr.findings) AS f WHERE sr.id = (SELECT id FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY CASE f->>'severity' WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'warning' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END

SELECT swept_at AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f->>'severity' = 'critical') AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f->>'severity' = 'warning') AS warning, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f->>'severity' = 'info') AS info FROM sweep_reports sr, jsonb_array_elements(sr.findings) AS f WHERE $__timeFilter(swept_at) GROUP BY swept_at ORDER BY swept_at

panels.description: Pool checkout, checkin, health check, and parallel sweep logs
panels.title: Pool & Parallel Sweep Logs
Embedding Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Ratio of embedding cache hits to total lookups

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_correlations
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_correlations WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Event Correlations (24h)
panels.description: Correlated events detected in last 24 hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(correlation_strength), 0) FROM event_correlations WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Max Correlation Strength
panels.description: Highest correlation strength in last 24h (1.0 = strongly correlated)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM metric_snapshots WHERE captured_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Metric Snapshots (24h)
panels.description: Infrastructure metric snapshots captured in last 24 hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT service_a, service_b, correlation_type, occurrence_count, ROUND(avg_time_delta_seconds::numeric, 1) AS avg_delta_sec, last_seen FROM service_correlations ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Service Failure Patterns
panels.description: Services that fail together or in sequence, ordered by frequency

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(detected_at, '1h') AS time, COUNT(*) AS correlations FROM event_correlations WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT detected_at, event_a_type, event_b_type, ROUND(time_delta_seconds::numeric, 1) AS delta_sec, ROUND(correlation_strength::numeric, 2) AS strength, root_cause_candidate FROM event_correlations ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent Event Correlations
panels.description: Most recent event correlations with strength scores

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_history WHERE sent_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 100) FROM notification_history WHERE sent_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Notification Success Rate
panels.description: Percentage of notifications successfully delivered in last 24h

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_history WHERE read_at IS NULL AND sent_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

panels.title: Unread Notifications
panels.description: Notifications not yet marked as read (last 7 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(sent_at, '1h') AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'critical') AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'warning') AS warning, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'info') AS info FROM notification_history WHERE $__timeFilter(sent_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT sent_at, channel_type, severity, title, success FROM notification_history ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent Notifications
panels.description: Most recent notifications with delivery status
